backupVerificationSubtitle: Confirm the requested recovery words before Spectra finishes wallet setup.
advancedSubtitle: Adjust derivation paths for compatibility with other wallets.
watchAddressesSubtitle: Enter one or more wallet addresses, one per line.
editWalletSubtitle: Update the name for this wallet.
seedImportMethodDescription: Use a BIP-39 recovery phrase to derive chain-specific wallet keys.
privateKeyImportMethodDescription: Use one raw hex private key. This mode supports every chain in this build except Monero.
importSeedLengthSubtitle: Choose the BIP-39 phrase length you are importing.
createSeedLengthSubtitle: Choose the BIP-39 phrase length for your new wallet.
seedPhraseEntryHelp: Enter one word per field. You can also paste multiple words into any field and Spectra will place them into the next slots.
createSeedPhraseWarning: Write this phrase down and store it offline. Anyone with these words controls your funds.
privateKeyPrompt: Paste a 32-byte hex private key. Prefixing with 0x is allowed.
backupVerifiedMessage: Backup verified. You can create your wallet.
backupVerificationHint: Enter each requested word exactly as in your seed phrase.
watchOnlyFixedMessage: Watch-only mode is fixed for existing wallets.
publicAddressOnlyMessage: This import mode uses a public address or extended public key only.
moneroWatchUnsupportedMessage: Monero currently does not support watched addresses in this build.
addressesToWatchSubtitle: Enter one address per line. Each line will be imported as its own watched address.
bitcoinWatchCaption: One address per line. Optional if xpub/zpub is provided instead.
